title: Slot Item Frames
description: Makes item frames into item slots
body:
## This pack only works in 26.1 and up, it uses new Resource Pack features added in that version!

This pack simply makes Item Frames and Glow Item Frames resemble inventory slots. Some items with special display properties are not yet properly implemented, such as Chests, Shields, and Copper Golem Statues. I'll get around to these eventually.

![A player-built inventory utilizing Slot Item Frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T9hqZOJH/images/efde5d9446d283a5d9b4927f119d5c34b5fda0f8.png)
